name: atlas-ally
description: Atlas Ally — Global Travel Intelligence Platform

scripts.prestart: node -e "console.log('PRESTART RUNNING');const fs=require('fs');const lines=fs.readFileSync('public/index.html','utf8').split('\n');const i=lines.findIndex(l=>l.length>100000);if(i!==-1){lines.splice(i,1);fs.writeFileSync('public/index.html',lines.join('\n'));console.log('Blob removed at line '+(i+1));}else{console.log('No blob found - index.html is clean');}"
